special_mechanics.name: Action-based and menu-driven battles
special_mechanics.description: Game features hybrid combat system combining real-time action elements with traditional RPG menu navigation

special_mechanics.name: Random encounter system
special_mechanics.description: Overworld random encounters with adjustable rates between Japanese (lower) and US (higher) versions

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources contain game design and localization information but no specific movement physics documentation. As an NES Action-RPG, precise physics parameters are not publicly documented. Game mechanics focus on RPG progression with action elements rather than precision platforming.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Little Ninja Brothers
